strategic_direction.title: Accelerate Webinar Traffic
strategic_direction.reasoning: The webinar is a central part of the current funnel campaign. Ensuring high registration and attendance will improve conversion rates and overall ROI of other active services like email marketing. Focus on the ads that are performing well and cut out the fat.

strategic_direction.title: Optimize Webinar Follow-Up Email Sequence
strategic_direction.reasoning: A well-crafted follow-up sequence is crucial to nurturing leads generated from the webinar. Automating this will save the client time and increase conversions. Kristen is already tasked with confirmation of flow, so next step is optimization.

strategic_direction.title: Website Audit & Optimization Proposal
strategic_direction.reasoning: The Prosper Group website is an untapped asset. A website audit will identify areas for improvement in terms of SEO, user experience, and lead generation. This can lead to an upsell opportunity for website development and ongoing maintenance.

suggested_agenda.topic: Quick Wins: Review and confirm progress on webinar ad traffic and budget increase
suggested_agenda.notes: Focus on positive momentum and immediate impact.

suggested_agenda.topic: Accountability Check: Address overdue items (client and B3X)
suggested_agenda.notes: Clear ownership and deadlines are essential for progress.

suggested_agenda.topic: Strategic Proposal: Discuss Webinar Email Follow-Up Sequence and Website Audit & Optimization Proposal
suggested_agenda.notes: Deep dive into proposed next steps and potential ROI.

suggested_agenda.topic: Next Steps: Align on action items and deadlines
suggested_agenda.notes: Ensure everyone is clear on their responsibilities.

strategic_direction.title: Transition to Evergreen Webinar Funnel
strategic_direction.reasoning: With the live webinar date (March 20th) passed, the focus should shift to a 24/7 evergreen model to maintain lead flow for the coaching business without manual intervention.

strategic_direction.title: High-Ticket Website Tech Audit
strategic_direction.reasoning: Prosper Group currently lacks an active website service. A professional coaching site is essential for establishing authority and improving the conversion rate of paid traffic coming from ads.

strategic_direction.title: Video Creative Performance Analysis
strategic_direction.reasoning: Item 'Check video usage' is pending. Coaching success relies heavily on personal brand; identifying which video hooks are resonating will inform the next batch of ad creatives.
